summary.zh: 这一赛季因艾尔顿·塞纳在圣马力诺大奖赛上的致命事故而蒙上阴影；迈克尔·舒马赫驾驶饱受技术合规争议的贝纳通 B194，在收官战与达蒙·希尔的相撞中锁定个人首个世界冠军。
summary.en: A season overshadowed by Ayrton Senna's fatal accident at the San Marino Grand Prix; Michael Schumacher, in a Benetton B194 dogged by technical-legality controversy, won his first title after colliding with Damon Hill at the season finale.

content.zh: 这一赛季因艾尔顿·塞纳在圣马力诺大奖赛上的致命事故而蒙上阴影；迈克尔·舒马赫驾驶饱受技术合规争议的贝纳通 B194，在收官战与达蒙·希尔的相撞中锁定个人首个世界冠军。
content.en: A season overshadowed by Ayrton Senna's fatal accident at the San Marino Grand Prix; Michael Schumacher, in a Benetton B194 dogged by technical-legality controversy, won his first title after colliding with Damon Hill at the season finale.
